memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir John Basset IV (1462 – 31 January 1529
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir John Basset of Heanton Punchardon and Umberleigh in Devon and Tehidy in Cornwall, was a courtier in the reign of Henry VIII.

He was the eldest son of Sir John Basset (1441–1485) of Tehidy in Corn …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Bassett於1462年出生在英國可瓦爾特希迪時，他的父親John Basset Jr21歲，母親Elizabeth Budockshyde21歲。他於大約1482年與Ann Denys在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1529年1月31日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾武內享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文阿黑林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Bassett于1462年出生在英国可瓦爾特希迪时，他的父亲John Basset Jr21岁，母亲Elizabeth Budockshyde21岁。他于大约1482年与Ann Denys在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1529年1月31日在英国英格兰可瓦爾武內享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文阿黑林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Bassett was born in 1462, in Tehidy, Cornwall, England, his father, John Basset Jr, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Budockshyde, was 21. He married Ann Denys about 1482, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 31 January 1529, in Camborne, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Atherington, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Bassett est né en 1462, à Tehidy, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John Basset Jr, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Budockshyde, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Ann Denys environ 1482, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 31 janvier 1529, à Camborne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Atherington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Bassett 1462 in Tehidy, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Basset Jr 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Budockshyde 21. Er hat um 1482 in England, United Kingdom Ann Denys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Januar 1529 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Camborne, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Atherington, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Bassett è nato il nel 1462 nel Tehidy, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, John Basset Jr, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Budockshyde, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Ann Denys circa 1482, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 31 gennaio 1529, nel Camborne, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Atherington, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Bassettが1462年にイギリスコルンワルテヒディで生まれた時，父John Basset Jrは21歳，母Elizabeth Budockshydeは21歳であった。約1482年にイギリスイギリスでAnn Denysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1529年1月31日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルカンボルンで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンアスエリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Bassett(이)가 1462년 영국 코른월 테히디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Basset Jr(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Budockshyde(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1482년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ann Denys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1529년 1월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 캄본에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 앳헤링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Bassett nasceu em 1462, em Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Basset Jr, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Budockshyde, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Denys aproximadamente 1482, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de janeiro de 1529, em Camborne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Atherington, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Bassett родился в 1462 г. в местности тэиди, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени John Basset Jr было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Budockshyde, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Denys около 1482 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 31 января 1529 г. в местности камборн, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности атирингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Bassett nació en 1462, en Tehidy, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, John Basset Jr, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Budockshyde, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ann Denys aproximadamente 1482, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 31 de enero de 1529, en Camborne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Atherington, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
